rationale: Educ. Code §7.0611 governs school district facility usage reporting—square footage, student capacity, and facility use. It does not reference homestead exemptions, property tax, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap exists.
quote: The agency by rule shall require each school district to annually report the following information in the form and manner prescribed by the agency:
_note: Rule is limited to facility usage reporting; no nexus to homestead exemption amounts.
